callout.label: ON PACE
callout.text: Two refinement weeks open up once design freezes Friday and groups clear client review.

workstreams.name: Groups & social discovery
workstreams.impact: Group creation, invites, location-based discovery, and admin approvals are moving through client review.

workstreams.name: Messaging & media
workstreams.impact: Real-time messaging, gallery uploads, and profile video with tier limits cleared internal QA this week.

workstreams.name: Admin & launch readiness
workstreams.impact: Admin moderation, notifications, account suspend, and regression sweep are lined up ahead of store submission.

workstreams.name: Stripe subscription
workstreams.impact: Subscription wiring is in place but held behind a feature flag pending Jay's pricing and premium gating call.

callout.label: TARGET
callout.text: Groups and messaging through client review by Friday, design freeze same day.

recommendations.title: Lock the design freeze this week
recommendations.rationale: Kabir is finishing the landing page and group view by Friday; one final pass lets design hand off cleanly to dev.
recommendations.impact: Unblocks Qasim's UI implementation and opens two clean refinement weeks before launch.

recommendations.title: Start Apple Developer and store submission prep now
recommendations.rationale: External native testing and App Store upload are still blocked by account access and signing credentials.
recommendations.impact: Turns submission week into a checklist instead of a credentials scramble.

recommendations.title: Keep client feedback inside Vercel inline comments
recommendations.rationale: Centralizing review comments keeps UI feedback tied to the exact screen and avoids Slack drift.
recommendations.impact: Shortens the review loop and protects the refinement window.

recommendations.title: Hold Stripe and AI-assisted bio behind flags
recommendations.rationale: Both features are close, but pricing and AI bio direction still need final client decisions.
recommendations.impact: Keeps the launch build stable while preserving a fast path to enable each feature.

callout.label: WHY NOW
callout.text: Week 6 is the last enhancement cycle; the next two weeks are refinement and store submission.

groups.label: Urgent - blocking this week
groups.summary: Hand-offs that hold up landing page polish and store submission.

items.detail: Jay to share finalized landing-page content so Kabir can finish the redesign matching the app.
Required to publish iOS builds to TestFlight and the App Store; currently blocking external native testing.

groups.label: Access - keep dev unblocked
groups.summary: Existing Couplify-licensed services we should reuse instead of re-procuring.

items.detail: Twilio, Amazon SES, Firebase, Persona, and Phenometrix keys for production handoff.
Needed for the automated about-me feature carry-over from the previous codebase.

groups.label: Upcoming - decisions we need soon
groups.summary: Product calls that gate scope before the refinement window opens.

items.detail: Decide whether to port Sri's existing automated-about-me flow or build a new version this cycle.

closing_data.thankYou: Thanks Couplify team - momentum is real heading into refinement.
